3195870.name: RPG Maker MZ - KR Peaceful Rest Graveyard Tileset
3195870.description:
Maybe this is where the story starts. Maybe this is where it ends. Either way, you’ll find everything you need to make a diverse and interesting cemetery for your mourners in this graveyard tileset. (Or, alternatively, your zombie apocalypse.)

This graveyard tileset features:

Ground tiles:

water, grass, dirt in somber colors to fit a dreary mood
rock path – multiple variations
tile path – multiple variations
rock and flower path
rosebush
several green ground covers
dirt path
4 fences
thorns
and more!

Wall tiles:

10 types of stone or concrete walls, plain and with decorative edges
rock wall
dirt wall
hedges
thorn wall

Also includes:

LOTS of headstones – over twenty designs to choose from, so you’ll find something just right
tiles for modern funerals (flower arrangements, canopy, etc)
elegant gates and fences
lanterns
coffins
lots of lighting choices
stone and wood arches
multiple choices for seating – benches plus single chairs suitable for funerals
tables and floral displays
color-coordinated foliage
RUINED VERSIONS of all the main object tiles – turn an ordinary cemetery into a horror zone!
freshly dug graves
skeletons
and more!

Terms of Use:

This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
OK to be used in Commercial projects
Contents can be edited
OK for use in games with gore
OK for use in adult-rated games
3195870.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
